subject: Create your GitHub profile to show off your skills
full_body:

( https://github.com?utm_source=github&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nux_email_2 )

Hi there,

Your GitHub profile is your personal developer portfolio. It’s a place where other developers can discover your projects and contributions.

*Today’s challenge? Build yours using Markdown, a lightweight language used on GitHub to create sleek README files, document code, and more.*

With Markdown, you can:

✅ Format text and add links
✅ Include images and GIFs
✅ Highlight your top repositories

Here’s how to get started:

📄 Follow this guide to create a GitHub profile README ( https://github.blog/developer-skills/github/beginners-guide-to-github-setting-up-and-securing-your-profile/#personalizing-your-profile?utm_source=github&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nux_email_2 )
💻 Use this Markdown cheatsheet to format your page ( https://docs.github.com/en/get-started/writing-on-github/getting-started-with-writing-and-formatting-on-github/basic-writing-and-formatting-syntax?utm_source=github&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nux_email_2 )
🚀 See inspiring profile examples from other developers ( https://github.com/trending/developers?utm_source=github&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nux_email_2 )

Learn Markdown (and build your README) ( https://docs.github.com/en/get-started/writing-on-github/getting-started-with-writing-and-formatting-on-github/quickstart-for-writing-on-github?utm_source=github&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nux_email_2 )

Happy coding,
The GitHub Team

( https://github.com?utm_source=github&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nux_email_2 )

subject: Build AI agents with the new GitHub Copilot SDK
body:
‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

( https://github.com?utm_source=email-cli-sdk-repo-cta&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cli-sdk-jan-2026 )

The
full_body:
‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

( https://github.com?utm_source=email-cli-sdk-repo-cta&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cli-sdk-jan-2026 )

The GitHub Copilot SDK ( https://github.com/github/copilot-sdk?utm_source=email-cli-sdk-repo-cta&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cli-sdk-jan-2026 ) is here (in technical preview) so you can build the AI tools, agents, and projects of your dreams.

Building agentic workflows from scratch is hard. You have to manage context, orchestrate tools and commands, route between models, integrate MCP servers - the list goes on. You’ve already built a small platform before you even get to the fun stuff. GitHub Copilot SDK removes that burden. It allows you to take the same agentic core that powers GitHub Copilot CLI and embed it in any application.

Get building with the GitHub Copilot SDK ( https://github.com/github/copilot-sdk?utm_source=email-cli-sdk-repo-cta&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cli-sdk-jan-2026 )

The GitHub Copilot SDK, starting with Node.js/TypeScript, Python, Go, and .NET, gives you programmatic access to the Copilot CLI.

Via the SDK, similar to the API, you can use your favorite programming language to:

* *Run sessions with multi-step planning and execution* (not just one-off prompts)
* *Multi-model support* so you can use the right model for each step
* *Built-in tool orchestration* via MCP servers
* *Error recovery and memory* that persists across sessions
* *Custom agents* you build yourself or get from the community

There’s no framework-building required to build your next favorite AI app. Build it anywhere, whether it’s in your CLI, an extension to your IDE, in a web app, a desktop app, an internal tool or dashboard, within a SaaS platform… the world’s your oyster.

----------------------
How can I get started?
----------------------

Head over to the github/copilot-sdk ( https://github.com/github/copilot-sdk?utm_source=email-cli-sdk-repo-cta&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cli-sdk-jan-2026 ) repository!

There, you’ll find setup instructions ( https://github.com/github/copilot-sdk/tree/main/cookbook?utm_source=email-cli-sdk-cookbooks-cta&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cli-sdk-jan-2026 ) , examples, and SDK references for each supported language.

Let us know what you think ( https://github.com/orgs/community/discussions/184872?utm_source=email-cli-sdk-cookbooks-cta&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cli-sdk-jan-2026 ) , and get building.

Privacy policy ( https://help.github.com/articles/github-privacy-policy/ ) • Terms of use ( https://help.github.com/articles/github-terms-of-service/ ) • Contact us ( https://docs.github.com/en/support/contacting-github-support ) • Unsubscribe ( https://mailing.github.com/asm/unsubscribe/?user_id=15762298&data=cWKzBf-WalDZ9bZjw_xrstO1UPzATqKN-RN7OKfXjo1oMDAwdTAwMB3zk_eUXQhD8-WXXJa3Y2oQAa4MNPgE0ZTgAKGO479nW1MWFWIlDPhvmDxEsIAl_pt3-qMXgpLWfFTc81Sqk3vu5IYu2miW46MKt8Sdu4hrnv5Hb7eX8fGDh1BSBxBGSSxQ4bXuBAifuxD1Lqf-LdB-XIGEHgpnQoWqVSLUVAGML3h96SDnDFQ2BBFOhV1sAEZ_6f5rGg9DO_IKuE7KW1R0wWxN23OhaQzQtCUyzC3Qynan5fkKw1JVmHPMvomnwrYqaWWFHUxremRriT3-hn45D17hn8UAhnSHtipbOd39N7ck1s3KNLkgZQLyqKBl9jQZErt2pS93ze9Tc3prhPWLndtUeZexSL3PPJ5sEpLRfpGuHDiqGc3wxn-dPyATMKD1784Fj2OoNp9lxaxZocTQzeiKnKDAP94YM9C8Zt0XbKaJWY0Oyq1XMalWEteBixPQBc3_PFdisu1q9f36n-_1TCPAA6W8HgPQ7ptvjyORkdkPFOTnPshShF--Z4ub3-S2FTqv5enEb0DB_mBrVUbetJcvJ-al65x8zidb6uzcuL3-_aF2DdLn6TEekoBe89akVSzSMUx8Y0m9vv8Fg5lyfX9T9MR7MErQV8N8ROiU2NjT-jOPa0tZyvs_jBkaa50ZUgRcWRXy8dsf6-QvBDrk2-8ETTrwPZVFobEtkeC6uF5lbZRKbgIghVjf_GXJ7ZVqmJw4UvfYeGkD2Qyc8lh3Zayjbs5SYSiMWwN6frbcdCSMOoX9Tstm9uVCEjX89ot3g_ZeAxlafNyeZgo9NWRwvGKq5F2_Xd-7l4YcW_70EmulZkzaHC_-zjxHpAE16O06gVHgwuOguAInAhmi3RvHrvwEuPCEJ3qWFPjxgrbVP373azx4d9pycjL5LYMTLXfn84v9Yua4W3vDScJR6cRAo8kXA4bXsEqj0NKTwx1gRi8c0XIynyhqwVrBXcFG7o_rJM20ts7w9z-G_0wmplpwD3wrY2pXOlTunBlrZqOoC48J43WAmfFNd7-O2GZjMJupWw7MMUHRF4krruHpZh5G_nuL739GHpseBI9QQm8xk__ttqoWsqui6kai9fu4AQ== )

subject: Code faster with AI: Try GitHub Copilot
full_body:
Boost your productivity (and learn faster) with AI ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌
( https://github.com?utm_source=github&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nux_email_7 )

( https://github.com?utm_source=github&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nux_email_7 )

Hi there,

Meet your new AI-powered coding assistant (and so much more): GitHub Copilot. It’s free to use if you have a GitHub account (which you do!).

Copilot helps you code faster with:

🤔 Smart code suggestions
📄 Instant documentation
💡 Chat-based coding assistance
🤖 Agents you can delegate tasks to
➕ And a whole lot more.

*Today’s challenge: Install Copilot and build a simple browser extension.*

1️⃣ Get access to GitHub Copilot ( https://docs.github.com/en/copilot/setting-up-github-copilot/setting-up-github-copilot-for-yourself?utm_source=github&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nux_email_7 )
2️⃣ Install the Copilot extension ( https://docs.github.com/en/copilot/managing-copilot/configure-personal-settings/installing-the-github-copilot-extension-in-your-environment?utm_source=github&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nux_email_7 )
3️⃣ Start coding with AI-powered suggestions ( https://github.blog/ai-and-ml/github-copilot/github-for-beginners-how-to-get-started-with-github-copilot/?utm_source=github&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nux_email_7 )
4️⃣ Check out this video to help get started ( https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=n0NlxUyA7FI )

*Want to talk to Copilot?*
With Copilot, you can ask GitHub Copilot Chat ( https://youtu.be/3surPGP7_4o?feature=shared ) questions about the work you’re doing. See all the ways you can ask Copilot complex questions and get smart answers with the Copilot Chat Cookbook ( https://docs.github.com/en/copilot/copilot-chat-cookbook?utm_source=github&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nux_email_7 ).

Try Copilot now ( https://github.com/features/copilot?utm_source=github&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nux_email_7 )

Happy coding,
The GitHub Team

( https://github.com?utm_source=github&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nux_email_7 )

The world’s most widely adopted Copilot-powered developer platform

Chat now

Just start typing whatever’s on your mind — a half-baked idea, a random question, a weird "what if."

subject:
Welcome to NPTEL Online Course : Introduction to Quantum Computing:
 Quantum Algorithms and Qiskit
body:
Dear Learner

Welcome to SWAYAM-NP
full_body:
Dear Learner

Welcome to SWAYAM-NPTEL Online Courses and Certification!

Thank you for signing up for our online course "Introduction to Quantum Computing: Quantum Algorithms and Qiskit". We wish you an enjoyable and informative learning experience.

Details regarding the course:
Name of the course: Introduction to Quantum Computing: Quantum Algorithms and Qiskit 
Course url: https://onlinecourses.nptel.ac.in/noc26_cs89/preview
Course duration : 4 weeks 

The course will begin on 19 January 2026 When content is released on the portal, you will get an email alerting you.

CONTENT AND ASSIGNMENTS

Every week, about 2.5 to 4 hours of videos containing content by the Course instructor will be released along with an assignment based on this. Please watch the lectures, follow the course regularly and submit all assessments and assignments before the due date. Your regular participation is vital for learning and doing well in the course. This will be done week on week through the duration of the course.
Please do the assignments yourself and even if you take help, kindly try to learn from it. These assignment will help you prepare for the final exams. Plagiarism and violating the Honor code will be taken very seriously if detected during the submission of assignments.

ANNOUNCEMENT AND DISCUSSION GROUPS TO CLEAR DOUBTS:

The announcement group - will only have messages from course instructors and teaching assistants - regarding the lessons, assignments, exam registration, hall tickets etc.
The discussion forum (Ask a question tab on the portal) - is for everyone to ask questions and interact.Anyone who knows the answers can reply to anyone's post and the course instructor/TA will also respond to your queries. Please make maximum use of this feature as this will help you learn much better.
If you have any questions regarding the exam, registration, hall tickets, results, queries related to the technical content in the lectures, any doubts in the assignments, etc can be posted in the forum section

TO GET A CERTIFICATE - PROCESS AND CRITERIA:
The course is free to enroll and learn from. But if you want a certificate, you have to register and write the proctored exam conducted by us in person at any of the designated exam centres.
The exam is optional for a fee of Rs 1000/- (Rupees one thousand only).
Date and Time of Exams: 28 March 2026 Morning session 9am to 12 noon; Afternoon Session 2pm to 5pm.
Registration url: Announcements will be made when the registration form is open for registrations.
The online registration form has to be filled and the certification exam fee needs to be paid. More details will be made available when the exam registration form is published. If there are any changes, it will be mentioned then.
Please check the form for more details on the cities where the exams will be held, the conditions you agree to when you fill the form etc.

CRITERIA TO GET A CERTIFICATE

Average assignment score = 25% of average of best 3 assignments out of the total 4 assignments given in the course.
Exam score = 75% of the proctored certification exam score out of 100

Final score = Average assignment score + Exam score

YOU WILL BE ELIGIBLE FOR A CERTIFICATE ONLY IF AVERAGE ASSIGNMENT SCORE >=10/25 AND EXAM SCORE >= 30/75. If one of the 2 criteria is not met, you will not get the certificate even if the Final score >= 40/100.

Certificate will have your name, photograph and the score in the final exam with the breakup.It will have the logos of NPTEL and IIT Madras. It will be e-verifiable at nptel.ac.in/noc.

Only the e-certificate will be made available. Hard copies will not be dispatched.

Once again, thanks for your interest in our online courses and certification. Happy learning.

- NPTEL team

Hi ,

Here’s a challenge you might enjoy today:

## What's Your Name?

subject:
Introduction to Quantum Computing: Quantum Algorithms and Qiskit :
 Week 4 Content & Assignment is live now !!
body: Dear Learners,
full_body:
Dear Learners,

The lecture videos for Week 4 have been uploaded for the course "Introduction to Quantum Computing: Quantum Algorithms and Qiskit". The lectures can be accessed using the following link:

Link: https://onlinecourses.nptel.ac.in/noc26_cs89/unit?unit=43&lesson=44

The other lectures in this week are accessible from the navigation bar to the left. Please remember to login into the website to view contents (if you aren't logged in already).

Assignment-4 for Week-4 is also released and can be accessed from the following link

Link: https://onlinecourses.nptel.ac.in/noc26_cs89/unit?unit=43&assessment=83

The assignment has to be submitted on or before Wednesday,[18/02/2026], 23:59 IST.

As we have done so far, please use the discussion forums if you have any questions on this module.

Note : Please check the due date of the assignments in the announcement and assignment page if you see any mismatch write to us immediately.

Thanks and Regards,

-NPTEL Team

--

subject: Updates to how privacy settings work on Play
body:
Hello jani,

We’ve updated settings that manage personalization and activity history on  
Play. You’ll have dedicated controls
full_body:
Hello jani,

We’ve updated settings that manage personalization and activity history on  
Play. You’ll have dedicated controls for personalization on Play and for  
saving activity in your Google Account’s Play History, and these settings  
will be easily accessible in the Google Play menu.

In the past, personalization and history on Play were managed by Web & App  
Activity (WAA) settings in your Google Account. Going forward, WAA will no  
longer control Play personalization and Play History. Instead, you’ll be  
able to manage those settings directly on Play, and you’ll see this change  
in your account in the next few days. Learn more about Play personalization  
and Play History  
<http://support.google.com/googleplay?p=personalize_play_migration>

When the transition happens for your account, your Play settings will be  
based on the most recent choice you made in WAA, so your experience will  
stay the same. If you have WAA turned on during the transition, which is  
happening over the next few days, then your Play personalization and Play  
History settings will be on, and if WAA is off, then Play personalization  
and Play History will be off. As before, you’ll be able to choose how long  
your activity is saved in your Play History and if you want to delete it  
from Play History manually or automatically.

After the transition is complete, WAA and Play settings will be separate,  
and changes to one will no longer affect the other. You can view and change  
your Play privacy settings in Personalization in Play  
<https://myactivity.google.com/product/google_play/personalization> at any  
time. Learn more about the transition and how it affects your settings  
<http://support.google.com/googleplay?p=personalize_play_migration>

Thanks for using Google Play!

Should you have any questions please visit our Help Center  
<https://notifications.google.com/g/p/ANiao5oRRq0eA50bEW-9D6N8upfeW0HxV9wA8lODs7ab7yXcEGdX4w9LZlb2nqrA_AOfq5sTY9uOrLIo_xwFMd0jwS-ZJjgn5mC31z45ySqgAxrUqqKmZffjVnKgDTHP0n98QE9pfdosCDug9oLl6zGrTWp1YmCRbF08dSqMA7Xh5VNswNToSKdgkyO_7XMQQBZfbSS8OD-Pq1ZDTswBPvMSZhz0fTytvSaU8B9Cuqv7IWUnQpnDg9wizn3gEdkfy8s19Tz4>  
or get in touch  
<https://notifications.google.com/g/p/ANiao5ppRjSyPEnzO-QKibVlGE7VlQnOpxw-BlC0rQ5RFGPruxzVOep0mY6k5PZGJtQZw5w_MzhxnoTKwfDhzX-oDXDtjuShn1EldBJkXI3-ys2a41YodB0UXVbY_V1G4hq9PGv9I2iNjQ-mgDIpPPpC9LzqIX5KmMzPgceOJhZncoAmd2wWyr1lwTjIiP7HRueIo8GA02qPiQAJDRdUCrqh0h8gFje2Ga3nZFtMLCCzlij7WNdoYEDQ94BfFIAh>.

(c) 2026 Google LLC, 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043, USA

You have received this mandatory email service announcement to update you  
about important changes to your Play product or account.

Please do not reply to this email, as we are unable to respond from this  
email address. If you need support, please visit the Google Play Help  
Center <https://support.google.com/googleplay>.

subject: Reminder: NPTEL: Exam Registration is open now for Jan 2026 courses!
body:
Dear Learner,

Here is the much-awaited announcement on registering for the Jan 2026 NPTEL course certification exam.

1. The regis
full_body:
Dear Learner,

Here is the much-awaited announcement on registering for the Jan 2026 NPTEL course certification exam.

1. The registration for the certification exam is open only to those learners who have enrolled in the course.
2. If you want to register for the exam for this course, login here using the same email id which you had used to enroll to the course in Swayam portal. Please note that Assignments submitted through the exam registered email id ALONE will be taken into consideration towards final consolidated score & certification.

3. Date of exam: March 28, 2026

 CLICK HERE to register for the exam.

Choose from the Cities where exam will be conducted: Exam Cities

4. Exam fees:

If you register for the exam and pay before Feb 09, 2026, Exam fees will be Rs. 1000/- per exam.

5. 50% fee waiver for the following categories:

Students belonging to the SC/ST category: please select Yes for the SC/ST option and upload the correct Community certificate.

Students belonging to the PwD category with more than 40% disability: please select Yes for the option and upload the relevant Disability certificate.

6. Last date for exam registration: Feb 13, 2026 (Friday).

7. Between Feb 09, 2026 & Feb 13, 2026 late fee will be applicable.

8. Mode of payment: Online payment - debit card/credit card/net banking/UPI.

9. HALL TICKET:

The hall ticket will be available for download tentatively by 2 weeks prior to the exam date. We will confirm the same through an announcement once it is published.

10. FOR CANDIDATES WHO WOULD LIKE TO WRITE MORE THAN 1 COURSE EXAM:- you can add or delete courses and pay separately – till the date when the exam form closes. Same day of exam – you can write exams for 2 courses in the 2 sessions. The same exam center will be allocated for both the sessions.

11. Data changes:

Last date for data changes: Feb 13, 2026:
We will charge an additional fee of Rs. 200 to make any changes related to name, DOB, photo, signature, SC/ST and PWD certificates after the last date of data changes.

The following 6 fields can be changed (until the form closes) ONLY when there are NO courses in the course cart. And you will be able to edit those fields only if you: -

REMOVE unpaid courses from the cart And/or - CANCEL paid courses

1. Do you come under the SC/ST category? *
2. SC/ST Proof
3. Are you a person with disabilities? *
4. Are you a person with disabilities above 40%?
5. Disabilities Proof
6. What is your role?

Note: Once you remove or cancel a course, you will be able to edit these fields immediately.
But, for canceled courses, refund of fees will be initiated only after 2 weeks.

12. LAST DATE FOR CANCELING EXAMS and getting a refund: Feb 13, 2026

13. Click here to view Timeline and Guideline : Guideline
Domain Certification

Domain Certification helps learners to gain expertise in a specific Area/Domain. This can be helpful for learners who wish to work in a particular area as part of their job or research or for those appearing for some competitive exam or becoming job ready or specializing in an area of study.

Every domain will comprise Core courses and Elective courses. Once a learner completes the requisite courses as per the mentioned criteria, you will receive a Domain Certificate showcasing your scores and the domain of expertise. Kindly refer to the following link for the list of courses available under each domain: https://nptel.ac.in/domains

Outside India Candidates
Candidates who are residing outside India may also fill the exam form and pay the fees. Mode of exam and other details will be communicated to you separately.

Thanks & Regards,
NPTEL TEAM

--

subject:
Week 4 Feedback Form : Introduction to Quantum Computing: Quantum
 Algorithms and Qiskit!!
body:
Dear Learners,

Thank you for continuing with the course and hope you are enjoying it.

We would like to
full_body:
Dear Learners,

Thank you for continuing with the course and hope you are enjoying it.

We would like to know if the expectations with which you joined this course are being met and hence please do take 2 minutes to fill out our weekly feedback form. It would help us tremendously in gauging the learner experience.

Here is the link to the form:  https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1uLT9SBF86Cqsq_RD9RpJfds6e9HrJQ_I739wrBrTooQ/viewform

Thank you

subject: Your free service ai-spam-detector is sleeping
body:
Hi there!

We noticed your free web service, ai-spam-detector, recently spun down after 15 minutes of inactivity.

Here’s why it happens: We run f
full_body: Hi there! We noticed your free web service, ai-spam-detector, recently spun down after 15 minutes of inactivity. Here’s why it happens: We run free services by letting them sleep when there’s no traffic—allowing us to offer our powerful, scalable platform free for you to try. However, each time your service starts again, it can take up to a minute it to get back online. Want fast load times 24/7? Upgrade to a Starter instance or higher. Here’s what you'll get when you do: * Always-On Availability: No more waiting for spin-ups; your service is always live. * Detailed Metrics & Shell Access: Track your performance in real time and troubleshoot easily. * Scaling: Handle increased load without jeopardizing uptime. Stay Online 24/7: Upgrade Now - https://dashboard.render.com/web/srv-d6etep450q8c73ad4o80/plan?utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=free-web-service-spin-down Prefer to stay on a free instance? No problem—your app is still there and ready whenever you need it. If you have questions or want tips for building on Render, check out our docs. https://render.com/docs The Render Team

full_body:
Welcome! Render gives you a fast, reliable cloud application platform that scales with you. Here's how to get started quickly.

Hi there,

Thanks for joining us! Let's get you up and running quickly.

In the Render dashboard: (https://d2xMk204.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/GG+113/d2xMk204/VWR0Mq1sCndcW3YbkY01gpvbpW1xTZ7Q5KY4C1N20xtvz3lcq-W6N1vHY6lZ3myW6WZ9nW1CnWMPN5qY4cMzsYG9W3fWMc17QdMw3W8GXN3s1tCHNFW8tcN-s47RB1qW4wyVX198QM4hW7ryzqg5xdnbXW6T2zV81-XtPGVBRpRy912kZgW6cSm4913Nj-vW7C4gqT68DqzTW7jSwmX20yCwCW8KPczN6bq8K1Vm34rJ6nw-tGW7mNCbt2s6dSmW1VxFS58YRVWsW84dnts165sbPW1JvZJM8_--rMW111Gsn1TRqDvV2xp0N6FPcMkW77Gf5F6HVwLGW4-Vlyk9bZbv7f8ND_Ys04 )

- Choose your service type
- Connect your source code
- Configure and deploy

- Specify your build and start commands
- Set environment variables if needed
- Click Create Web Service (or relevant service type)

- Your service will be live in moments!

With Render you get a fast, reliable cloud application platform that scales with you, so you can focus on shipping features.

Deploy, manage and scale your entire stack, including:

- Backend (web services, private services, background workers, cron jobs)
- Frontend (web services, static sites backed by a global CDN)
- Datastores (managed PostgreSQL and Redis, plus custom database support)

Build and scale multi-service architectures with Kubernetes-like powers—and without the overhead.

Ready to ship? Deploy your first project (https://d2xMk204.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/GG+113/d2xMk204/VWR0Mq1sCndcW3YbkY01gpvbpW1xTZ7Q5KY4C1N20xtvz3lcq-W6N1vHY6lZ3myW6WZ9nW1CnWMPN5qY4cMzsYG9W3fWMc17QdMw3W8GXN3s1tCHNFW8tcN-s47RB1qW4wyVX198QM4hW7ryzqg5xdnbXW6T2zV81-XtPGVBRpRy912kZgW6cSm4913Nj-vW7C4gqT68DqzTW7jSwmX20yCwCW8KPczN6bq8K1Vm34rJ6nw-tGW7mNCbt2s6dSmW1VxFS58YRVWsW84dnts165sbPW1JvZJM8_--rMW111Gsn1TRqDvV2xp0N6FPcMkW77Gf5F6HVwLGW4-Vlyk9bZbv7f8ND_Ys04 )

subject: Exam Format - March, 2026!!
body: Dear Candidate,
full_body:
Dear Candidate,

****This is applicable only for the exam registered candidates****

Type of exam will be available in the list: Click Here

You will have to appear at the allotted exam center and produce your Hall ticket and Government Photo Identification Card (Example: Driving License, Passport, PAN card, Voter ID, Aadhaar-ID with your Name, date of birth, photograph and signature) for verification and take the exam in person. You can find the final allotted exam center details in the hall ticket.

The hall ticket is yet to be released. We will notify the same through email and SMS.

Type of exam: Computer based exam (Please check in the above list corresponding to your course name)

The questions will be on the computer and the answers will have to be entered on the computer; type of questions may include multiple choice questions, fill in the blanks, essay-type answers, etc.

Type of exam: Paper and pen Exam (Please check in the above list corresponding to your course name)

The questions will be on the computer. You will have to write your answers on sheets of paper and submit the answer sheets. Papers will be sent to the faculty for evaluation.

On-Screen Calculator Demo Link:

Kindly use the below link to get an idea of how the On-screen calculator will work during the exam.

https://tcsion.com/OnlineAssessment/ScientificCalculator/Calculator.html

NOTE: Physical calculators are not allowed inside the exam hall.

Thank you!

-NPTEL Team

--

full_body:
Render supports every layer of your stack. Spin up a Render-managed PostgreSQL database or Redis instance.

Hi there,

Many developers start on Render with a web service or static site, but did you know we support every layer of your stack?

You can spin up a managed PostgreSQL database or Redis instance on Render in just a few clicks.

Start for free to test things out, then upgrade when you're ready to grow. Create your database now. (https://d2xMk204.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/GG+113/d2xMk204/VWGmc737vfhfW8FRGjf6qN29VW7dH9HJ5L2wRnN5yXtl63pyd0W7Y8-PT6lZ3lsW92BYGD79j04wW5dxYns4WppVBV6qX-S1JvFWYVk9L1V5Xlj3RW8myR7y8DT3zGW3Tz8qk1yg8XFW6lVRFB8fMLwCW2PZwq-8vsPMqW8VdJCG84qJXFW5LmM5X81Q__DW5-sS5z98bqP6W4zLGmf8yT87PW62sQl53hB-D0W85FzJf81f-q3W6pzFlS1Pl6YKW8Yj3jm8X9RpCW7vFgn04_qcYDW6srnGn4xs8blW7b61vg6RGxHwW34PZsj60b4RZVGyFsT8XZQv2W4VR7fv3l7-6DW61DFFB2YnBn4W5CQ6lY2XwFR_VcbzWR8dx3p6N4hyWpc2H4Sjf6jThMH04 )

Internal connections to your datastores are fast and secure over Render's private network. Plus, you can selectively allow external connections with IP-based controls.

For detailed instructions, see the documentation (https://d2xMk204.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/GG+113/d2xMk204/VWGmc737vfhfW8FRGjf6qN29VW7dH9HJ5L2wRnN5yXtjF5n4LbW50kH_H6lZ3l6W440zN78QhZMtW47dTpk3z_4ktW7HmRFh6s2mYvW9jSt_G7DgB4rW7hnCFk6BZhPxVsPJjB4s9Tn1W68h2yy1zbqyqW4cVW4J7pHslPW62-BRX8bQZqsN703jwjGGBxhW1Ns8K-2G7w3dW3hq4cC5F5ytFW1b708l4RdM4sVbP-Fy2YHZsWVh0-qf2Bn65GW20xtfv34lH51W462yLl9hZDc7W8tHn1T99TrX-VhmSnv5x0GxQW86NRtB61NbFKW1DFpGT3Q1QsnMbHKgNY_b-yW6rPx9X8xPvMjW5qq9505MmPhsVpQSMb2b9HrMW7wCdMg90wQBxW8CryjM967s5pW1S8sQv7xCSvfW7zJDtp1tKXtYW59VDxJ4k3b9vW8Z8NG87L1cCPW4xltV82NW-fHf83mFY-04 ) .

subject: [GitHub] Your password was reset
body:
Hello janisannigandla,

We wanted to let you know that your GitHub password was reset.

If you did not perform this action, you can recover access
full_body:
Hello janisannigandla,

We wanted to let you know that your GitHub password was reset.

If you did not perform this action, you can recover access by entering janisannigandla226@gmail.com into the form at https://github.com/password_reset

To secure your account, follow the steps outlined by https://docs.github.com/articles/preventing-unauthorized-access

To see this and other security events for your account, visit https://github.com/settings/security-log

If you run into problems, please contact support by visiting https://github.com/contact

Please do not reply to this email with your password. We will never ask for your password, and we strongly discourage you from sharing it with anyone.

subject: How to enhance performance with automated processes
body:
Background workers and cron jobs help you efficiently automate your workflows.

Hi there,

Today I'd like to highlight two powerful features that
full_body:
Background workers and cron jobs help you efficiently automate your workflows.

Hi there,

Today I'd like to highlight two powerful features that can help you automate tasks and enhance application performance:

Background workers: Keep your app responsive by offloading long-running tasks from the critical path.

Cron jobs: Schedule tasks to run automatically at specified intervals.

With Render, you can create these service types to help you handle tasks that run in the background or periodically.

Get started in the Render Dashboard (https://d2xMk204.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/GG+113/d2xMk204/VVXLYQ3S7dPKW23QK3P5T2LbCW7-75Mp5L8Z2NN3cFw6g3pyd0W7Y8-PT6lZ3kDW6_LY5J3j0_l9W4LmYtL6jD1qzW48fq8945zD3cW7G329S9cNDDcW71WSrk6pK2QKW8RLm9S955TmTW4rsNMz5v8YstW3Szf314XnnCpW8zX_nw8fwnlhW3kW0SM20FmkyW5GPSzy7zxqJRW5w1prP6-JT4pW3SmXW65Jdr1GW3gnbwx8yRD-6W8cF23x5hx-JpW5H1tWl8FG-fSW50VQQ6466pmLW78B7XR88xPHtW8JVRPK8qp4rFW6R10BH2v5xZnW7zllXF9f1LtHVjgmHJ842yrnW1blQz_3Lq8_WW8k2kvQ7-2PYhVYx7JX4t2LjDVRvvZc8HPR5Mf4XKVS604 ) : Click + New and then select Background Worker or Cron Job.

subject:
Introduction to Quantum Computing: Quantum Algorithms and Qiskit:
 Assignment 4 Solutions Released!!
full_body:
Dear Learners,

The solutions for Week 4 for the course "Introduction to Quantum Computing: Quantum Algorithms and Qiskit" have been released in the portal.

Please go through the solution, and in case of any doubt, post your queries in the forum.

Assignment 4 Solution Link: https://onlinecourses.nptel.ac.in/noc26_cs89/unit?unit=43&lesson=88&is_downloadable_resource=0

Happy Learning!

Thanks & Regards,
NPTEL Team

How to enhance app security and performance
body:
Private services only accept network connections from your own private network.

Hi there,

As your project on Render grows, I wanted to introduce
full_body:
Private services only accept network connections from your own private network.

Hi there,

As your project on Render grows, I wanted to introduce you to a powerful tool that can enhance your app's security and performance: private services.

Private services operate within a secure, private network, allowing you to:

-

Enhance security by blocking traffic from the open internet

-

Improve performance by lowering latency between your services

-

Easily create microservice-based applications

They're perfect for internal APIs, backend processing, or database management systems.

To set up a private service:

- Launch the Render Dashboard (https://d2xMk204.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/GG+113/d2xMk204/VWtr8w6vK544W16tpXX8PHt46W2gkVcw5Lfdy4N1vWRsz3pyd0W7Y8-PT6lZ3n9N3yGpW6TVwDjW3Rtlln1HGXhjW35TzhS6_7Qh9W11BYmf97N8d5W91Mk3g9fBdy3W8hSdmC38cZl8W3H7tLP8mKqrrW2Nx0v37Vs27VW2HgcVS3JbGgbW52PXWX4wjl_8Vj_MX93Lz7ZXW4STLbb8h2y1hW94QPnv2BqN31W2HNhDj6x3VqTW9fj0H63YNdBCW6lPjfR7G2CD3W87kn4312g4YSW5bH8FG5VZXGQW3n5Gvl6YCKk0W70JrJq4Gh6NVW2JGyB06NvnQvN8mkffMvJycRW4xvFMT2ljN_5W5sXg7830f0qKW40fRSF8hxrZWW6nbQDB1zhff6dy_x6404 )
- Click + New and select Private Service
- Choose your configuration and deploy

Pro Tip: If your service doesn't need to be accessible via a public URL, it can be deployed as a private service.

Want to learn more? Check out the documentation (https://d2xMk204.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/GG+113/d2xMk204/VWtr8w6vK544W16tpXX8PHt46W2gkVcw5Lfdy4N1vWRsz3pyd0W7Y8-PT6lZ3mhW6gjf_m94L3WxW21Jjbw1z17VyVzXfjR4NZZhFW1nkTmH5WWsWPVy38BV2cQX1sVK1N2Q2619WcW6ZGH_N35sH8CW7rFrxc4Kv11VW2srPLl26ksd8W5JNSZs5tZVY-W4c5XgW4N2jBRW2wvfxR7dFSPJW1qhPGb2JWWwHW5TNTxB14qC4MW7WhQS65n7Z2pW7X4M_g4k16cMN6j-xDjpkfXrW7PCjKn3ks_3gW8MMXkC4PPP8jW3mDKzQ8Tb_k3N255l1x_xcJnW92-82c1SWRMRW5qz0C63-lr4pVXDFy23clc4GW6hm6V81njxSTW30gG7f187gRrd-S7Zb04 ) .

Need help connecting to your private service? Click Contact support in your dashboard.

Have general product feedback? Just hit reply.

Stephen

subject: Build, deploy, and monitor your application in one place
body:
As you've discovered, Render provides a comprehensive cloud platform that simplifies deployment, security, and scaling.

Hi there,

Render provide
full_body:
As you've discovered, Render provides a comprehensive cloud platform that simplifies deployment, security, and scaling.

Hi there,

Render provides a comprehensive cloud platform that simplifies deployment, security, and scaling.

You can spin up several different service types and connect them together, including:

- web services
- static sites
- databases
- background workers

This allows developers to focus on coding while Render handles the infrastructure.

Welcome to Google Photos

The home for your memories


Get started by turning on automatic backup to keep your photos and videos  
safe. With automatic backup on, you’ll be able to securely access your  
photos and videos from any device, and they will be protected in the event  
your device is lost.

subject: March 2026 NPTEL Exams - Hall Tickets Released!
body: ***THIS ANNOUNCEMENT IS ONLY FOR THOSE WHO HAVE REGISTERED AND PAID FOR THE MARCH 2026 EXAM***
full_body:
***THIS ANNOUNCEMENT IS ONLY FOR THOSE WHO HAVE REGISTERED AND PAID FOR THE MARCH 2026 EXAM***


Dear Candidate,

Your Hall Ticket / admit card for the NPTEL Exam(s) in March, 2026 has been released.

You may have received an email with a link to download the Hall ticket to your registered email ID. Please refer to it for further details.

It is the responsibility of the candidate to download the hall ticket at their end. Please check your registered email ID.

Note: Requests for changes in exam city, exam center, exam date, session, or course will NOT be entertained.

Please write to support@nptel.iitm.ac.in for any further queries.

All the best for your exams!




With Regards,
NPTEL Team

--
You received this message because you are subscribed to the Google Groups "Announcement list for Intro. to Quantum Computing: Algorithms & Qiskit" group.
To unsubscribe from this group and stop receiving emails from it, send an email to noc26-cs89-announce+unsubscribe@nptel.iitm.ac.in.
To view this discussion visit https://groups.google.com/a/nptel.iitm.ac.in/d/msgid/noc26-cs89-announce/CIUHIEjWRIaF4Y0KSdH2IQ%40geopod-ismtpd-6.
For more options, visit https://groups.google.com/a/nptel.iitm.ac.in/d/optout.

subject: Important Update to GitHub Copilot Interaction Data Usage Policy
body:
‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

( https://github.com?utm_source=github&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=FY26MAR-WW-LCM-X-CBCE-AA-Devs-TX-701Kg0000
full_body:
‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

( https://github.com?utm_source=github&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=FY26MAR-WW-LCM-X-CBCE-AA-Devs-TX-701Kg000000PijXIAS )

Hi there,

We’re updating how GitHub uses data to improve AI-powered coding tools. From April 24 onward, your interactions with GitHub Copilot—including inputs, outputs, code snippets, and associated context—may be used to train and enhance AI models *unless you opt out*.

If you previously opted out of the setting allowing GitHub to collect this data for product improvements, your preference has been retained— your choice is preserved, and your data will not be used for training unless you opt in.

This approach aligns with established industry practices and will enable our models to deliver more context-aware AI coding assistance. We have tested this with Microsoft interaction data and have seen meaningful improvements, including increased acceptance rates in multiple languages.

Please review your settings and choose whether your interactions with Copilot can be leveraged for training AI models before this update goes into effect on April 24. To opt out or adjust your settings:

* Go to *GitHub Account Settings*
* Select *Copilot*
* Choose whether to allow your data to be used for AI model training

To learn more, please refer to our blog post ( https://gh.io/AAzfaht?utm_source=github&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=FY26MAR-WW-LCM-X-CBCE-AA-Devs-TX-701Kg000000PijXIAS ) and FAQ ( https://github.com/orgs/community/discussions/188488?utm_source=github&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=FY26MAR-WW-LCM-X-CBCE-AA-Devs-TX-701Kg000000PijXIAS ).

Please reach out to our support team ( https://docs.github.com/en/support/contacting-github-support?utm_source=github&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=FY26MAR-WW-LCM-X-CBCE-AA-Devs-TX-701Kg000000PijXIAS ) if you have any questions about this update. Thank you for your continued use of GitHub Copilot.

Sincerely,
The GitHub Team

Privacy policy ( https://help.github.com/articles/github-privacy-policy/ ) • Terms of use ( https://help.github.com/articles/github-terms-of-service/ ) • Contact us ( https://docs.github.com/en/support/contacting-github-support )

GitHub, Inc.  •  88 Colin P Kelly Jr Street  •  San Francisco, CA 94107

You are receiving this because you are a GitHub Copilot user.

subject:
Introduction to Quantum Computing: Quantum Algorithms and Qiskit :
 Final Feedback Form !!!
body:
Dear students,

We are glad that you have attended the NPTEL online certification course.

We hop
full_body:
Dear students,

We are glad that you have attended the NPTEL online certification course.

We hope you found the NPTEL Online course useful and have started using NPTEL extensively.

In this regard, we would like to have feedback from you regarding our course and whether there are any improvements, you would like to suggest.
 
We are enclosing an online feedback form and would request you to spare some of your valuable time to input your observations. Your esteemed input will help us in serving you better.

The link to give your feedback is: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1KElmymunMe0SzVQMyo_aDGA1k7J7XBTtSsvFQKt81Y8/viewform

We thank you for your valuable time and feedback.

Thanks & Regards,

subject:
Parallel agents, multi-step planning, and skills: what's new in VS
 Code
body:
GitHub Copilot in VS Code is even better since you last used it. Jump back in with the latest features for a more unified agent experience.
‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌
full_body:
GitHub Copilot in VS Code is even better since you last used it. Jump back in with the latest features for a more unified agent experience.
‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

( https://github.com?utm_source=lcm-vscode&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=FY26MAR-WW-LCM-NDG-Pro-IND-Dev-PRM-X-701Kg000000PidFIAS )

Jump back into GitHub Copilot in VS Code with a more unified agent experience running parallel agents, planning multi-step tasks, and extending Copilot with skills.

Use agents in VS Code ( https://code.visualstudio.com/multi-agent-development?utm_source=lcm-vscode&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=FY26MAR-WW-LCM-NDG-Pro-IND-Dev-PRM-X-701Kg000000PidFIAS )

( https://code.visualstudio.com/multi-agent-development?utm_source=lcm-vscode&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=FY26MAR-WW-LCM-NDG-Pro-IND-Dev-PRM-X-701Kg000000PidFIAS )

Agent sessions
--------------

VS Code now lets you start and manage multiple agent tasks in parallel ( https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/agents/overview?utm_source=lcm-vscode&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=FY26MAR-WW-LCM-NDG-Pro-IND-Dev-PRM-X-701Kg000000PidFIAS ). One agent can implement a feature in the background via Copilot CLI while another fixes a failing test or explores a refactor. The redesigned agent sessions view shows all your agents and lets you switch between them as they work.

Use agent sessions in VS Code → ( https://code.visualstudio.com/multi-agent-development?utm_source=lcm-vscode&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=FY26MAR-WW-LCM-NDG-Pro-IND-Dev-PRM-X-701Kg000000PidFIAS )

( https://code.visualstudio.com/chat-planning?utm_source=lcm-vscode&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=FY26MAR-WW-LCM-NDG-Pro-IND-Dev-PRM-X-701Kg000000PidFIAS )

Plan agent
----------

The plan agent ( https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/agents/planning?utm_source=lcm-vscode&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=FY26MAR-WW-LCM-NDG-Pro-IND-Dev-PRM-X-701Kg000000PidFIAS ) creates a detailed, step-by-step implementation plan before making any edits. It asks questions to clarify requirements and turns your idea into a structured plan. You can verify the approach and when you're ready, hand it off to a background or local agent to execute.

Use plan agent in VS Code → ( https://code.visualstudio.com/chat-planning?utm_source=lcm-vscode&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=FY26MAR-WW-LCM-NDG-Pro-IND-Dev-PRM-X-701Kg000000PidFIAS )

( https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/customization/agent-skills?utm_source=lcm-vscode&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=FY26MAR-WW-LCM-NDG-Pro-IND-Dev-PRM-X-701Kg000000PidFIAS )

Agent Skills
------------

Agent Skills in VS Code shape how agents behave by giving them domain-specific context ( https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/customization/agent-skills?utm_source=lcm-vscode&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=FY26MAR-WW-LCM-NDG-Pro-IND-Dev-PRM-X-701Kg000000PidFIAS ). You can define workflows, constraints, or knowledge in SKILLS.md files, and agents will use that context when running tasks. This keeps agents focused and makes their output more relevant to your codebase.

Start learning now → ( https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/customization/agent-skills?utm_source=lcm-vscode&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=FY26MAR-WW-LCM-NDG-Pro-IND-Dev-PRM-X-701Kg000000PidFIAS )

Was this helpful?
-----------------

👍 ( https://github.com/features/ai/thank-you?utm_source=lcm-vscode-thu&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=FY26MAR-WW-LCM-NDG-Pro-IND-Dev-PRM-X-701Kg000000PidFIAS ) 👎 ( https://github.com/features/ai/thank-you?utm_source=lcm-vscode-thd&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=FY26MAR-WW-LCM-NDG-Pro-IND-Dev-PRM-X-701Kg000000PidFIAS )

( https://x.com/github?utm_source=lcm-vscode&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=FY26MAR-WW-LCM-NDG-Pro-IND-Dev-PRM-X-701Kg000000PidFIAS ) ( https://www.instagram.com/GitHub/?utm_source=lcm-vscode&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=FY26MAR-WW-LCM-NDG-Pro-IND-Dev-PRM-X-701Kg000000PidFIAS ) ( https://www.youtube.com/github?utm_source=lcm-vscode&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=FY26MAR-WW-LCM-NDG-Pro-IND-Dev-PRM-X-701Kg000000PidFIAS ) ( https://www.linkedin.com/company/github/?utm_source=lcm-vscode&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=FY26MAR-WW-LCM-NDG-Pro-IND-Dev-PRM-X-701Kg000000PidFIAS ) ( https://github.com/?utm_source=lcm-vscode&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=FY26MAR-WW-LCM-NDG-Pro-IND-Dev-PRM-X-701Kg000000PidFIAS )

[Buy BTC, ETH, or BNB via Spot or Convert—get up to 200 USDT as loss reimbursement if the price drops. ]— 
7-Day Price Protection on Your First Trade
During the campaign period, buy BTC, ETH, or BNB via Spot or Convert—get up to 200 USDT as loss reimbursement if the price drops.

This campaign is only open to new and existing users who have not yet traded Spot or Convert on Binance.
Opt In To Participate
HOW TO PARTICIPATE?
STEP 1: REGISTER
Click the registration button on the campaign page
Step 2: Complete Your First Trade
Within 14 days after Opt-in, complete your first trade on eligible Spot or Convert pairs by buying BTC, ETH, or BNB.
Step 3: Enjoy 7-Day Price Protection
Enjoy a subsidy of up to 200 USDT on any loss incurred on this first trade after 7 days. You must be holding an amount of the purchased crypto equal to or greater than your first trade to be eligible.
Opt In To Participate

DOWNLOAD APP NOW

STAY CONNECTED!
To stay secure, setup your anti-phishing code here
RISK WARNING: Digital asset prices can be volatile. The value of your investment may go down or up and you may not get back the amount invested. You are solely responsible for your investment decisions and Binance is not liable for any losses you may incur. Not financial advice. For more information, see our Terms of Use and Risk Warning.

DISCLAIMER: In compliance with MiCA requirements, unauthorized stablecoins are subject to certain restrictions for EEA users. Please disregard this communication if you are a user from the EEA. For more information, please click here.

KINDLY NOTE: Please be aware of phishing sites and always make sure you are visiting the official Binance.com website when entering sensitive data.

subject: 7-Day Price Protection on Your First Trade
body: <html xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" xmlns:v="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:vml" xmlns:o="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:office:office"><head> <title> </
full_body:
[Buy BTC, ETH, or BNB via Spot or Convert—get up to 200 USDT as loss reimbursement if the price drops. ]— 
7-Day Price Protection on Your First Trade
During the campaign period, buy BTC, ETH, or BNB via Spot or Convert—get up to 200 USDT as loss reimbursement if the price drops.

This campaign is only open to new and existing users who have not yet traded Spot or Convert on Binance.
Opt In To Participate
HOW TO PARTICIPATE?
STEP 1: REGISTER
Click the registration button on the campaign page
Step 2: Complete Your First Trade
Within 14 days after Opt-in, complete your first trade on eligible Spot or Convert pairs by buying BTC, ETH, or BNB.
Step 3: Enjoy 7-Day Price Protection
Enjoy a subsidy of up to 200 USDT on any loss incurred on this first trade after 7 days. You must be holding an amount of the purchased crypto equal to or greater than your first trade to be eligible.
Opt In To Participate

DOWNLOAD APP NOW

STAY CONNECTED!
To stay secure, setup your anti-phishing code here
RISK WARNING: Digital asset prices can be volatile. The value of your investment may go down or up and you may not get back the amount invested. You are solely responsible for your investment decisions and Binance is not liable for any losses you may incur. Not financial advice. For more information, see our Terms of Use and Risk Warning.

DISCLAIMER: In compliance with MiCA requirements, unauthorized stablecoins are subject to certain restrictions for EEA users. Please disregard this communication if you are a user from the EEA. For more information, please click here.

KINDLY NOTE: Please be aware of phishing sites and always make sure you are visiting the official Binance.com website when entering sensitive data.

subject: Invitation: Join the Launch of
body:
Dear Learners,

As part of NPTEL’s Quantum course participants, you are invited to the launch event of India’s First Quan
full_body:
Dear Learners,

As part of NPTEL’s Quantum course participants, you are invited to the launch event of India’s First Quantum Reference Facility. On 14th April 2026 (World Quantum Day), Andhra Pradesh Chief Minister, N. Chandrababu Naidu will launch India’s first Indigenous Quantum Reference Facilities in Amaravati and congratulate all of you for successfully completing the course.

These facilities are designed to help students, researchers, and startups explore and work on quantum technology—one of the most exciting fields of the future. Established at SRM University-AP and Medha Towers, the initiative will provide access to advanced systems where you can learn, experiment, and innovate. With a strong focus on Indigenous development and support from organizations like IBM, this marks a significant step toward making India a global leader in quantum innovation.

🎥 Join the event virtually:

Microsoft Teams Meeting Link:
https://teams.microsoft.com/meet/4818507439829?p=evoTZS1lCFSe4jVkxo

Meeting ID: 481 850 743 982 9
Passcode: Fb6LE696

We warmly invite you to attend and be part of this milestone event.

Don’t miss this opportunity to witness the future of technology!


Best regards,
Course Team

--
You received this message because you are subscribed to the Google Groups "Announcement list for Intro. to Quantum Computing: Algorithms & Qiskit" group.
To unsubscribe from this group and stop receiving emails from it, send an email to noc26-cs89-announce+unsubscribe@nptel.iitm.ac.in.
To view this discussion visit https://groups.google.com/a/nptel.iitm.ac.in/d/msgid/noc26-cs89-announce/W34IDA79QsSIZFzTahcqFw%40geopod-ismtpd-2.
For more options, visit https://groups.google.com/a/nptel.iitm.ac.in/d/optout.

subject: Fwd: Invitation: Join the Launch of India’s First Quantum Reference Facilities
body:
Live Youtube link for the event:
https://youtube.com/live/0EvUWqsqC6g?feature=share
Request all interested to join the event.


---------- Forwar
full_body:
Live Youtube link for the event:
https://youtube.com/live/0EvUWqsqC6g?feature=share
Request all interested to join the event.


---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: <onlinecourses@nptel.iitm.ac.in>
Date: Sat, Apr 11, 2026 at 10:51 AM
Subject: Invitation: Join the Launch of India’s First Quantum Reference
Facilities
To: <noc26-cs89-announce@nptel.iitm.ac.in>


Dear Learners,

As part of NPTEL’s Quantum course participants, you are invited to the
launch event of India’s First Quantum Reference Facility. On 14th April
2026 (World Quantum Day), Andhra Pradesh Chief Minister, N. Chandrababu
Naidu will launch India’s first Indigenous Quantum Reference Facilities in
Amaravati and congratulate all of you for successfully completing the
course.

These facilities are designed to help students, researchers, and startups
explore and work on quantum technology—one of the most exciting fields of
the future. Established at SRM University-AP and Medha Towers, the
initiative will provide access to advanced systems where you can learn,
experiment, and innovate. With a strong focus on Indigenous development and
support from organizations like IBM, this marks a significant step toward
making India a global leader in quantum innovation.

🎥 Join the event virtually:

Microsoft Teams Meeting Link:
https://teams.microsoft.com/meet/4818507439829?p=evoTZS1lCFSe4jVkxo
<https://u3447072.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.KVe6xeK12Gy7P9NKD6c-2FfFCw1oRQUM06tdG-2BZ-2Fj95Nn89E7IT6WvgFVRSGwTX605MAUWf6JS4tsGV3-2BKlSlFXNf8JYQX276NBvYHHS3WKFA-3DjqaC_SrqTdgxHwt4G1HcV0Pu3p3MIqt3gzzQvNFMJrGjt2MbHZ3lHAh9V6Wn9HBzYfy6WWuwmxGzfnT-2FsChQ-2B0IoVlXtIFCcAUvnAbMDlV-2BRBaifbFOZWPo-2BjrIInadoKAhlOm2PX-2Fd6ZlriXXN0b6Ro1N1DdgQThtg1C0GqLJM1Xij4WYfsIV3pYf10812-2BG-2Bf0F9xahawfbX0DnrlxXvi0LrUyz1TngMU0ySDVqWy85DGA-3D>

Meeting ID: 481 850 743 982 9
Passcode: Fb6LE696

We warmly invite you to attend and be part of this milestone event.

Don’t miss this opportunity to witness the future of technology!


Best regards,
Course Team

-- 
You received this message because you are subscribed to the Google Groups
"Announcement list for Intro. to Quantum Computing: Algorithms & Qiskit"
group.
To unsubscribe from this group and stop receiving emails from it, send an

Plus, new templates and a host of CLI improvements

View in browser (https://d2xMk204.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/GG+113/d2xMk204/VWm1JK6SbQv5W2rGnRV25
full_body:
Plus, new templates and a host of CLI improvements

View in browser (https://d2xMk204.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/GG+113/d2xMk204/VWm1JK6SbQv5W2rGnRV25TXRYW4vJbXQ5MZlB7N4Pt_MY5jMY8W7lCGcx6lZ3mmW63VcWp42JRP2W3cgSBn1645_3W1nP_Gg2McTWFW26l4qJ65wBvLW599Bh_17xmClW4pSTj32gjTBTW1p8gw27vF_5kW1lcqZr4jDP1FW28h_ml1NYrk-W4Nz8J-7Ll_J4W38w-ZL1C125LW5l0WW58wdsTcW7zwT775wGMzpV_CsPx1Tt8f6VsM7b21lQqP-W7-k-Yb8NN0T7VGrgsq6091Z7W2LtXBw3ldwB8W2YLKQW8zmHb4W8vNm3V1wHx4hMRKSzDh6fpcW4kxg2C8-PQkRW3kR2MJ1LqrXDW7MTb771jKgSYN5pX0Sxqvf32W2XSXV984l9H2N7n5VgBXCLJFVD87S71nW5GZW2Pgbvc45JypfN6D79Vf1yBNNV81HTb1lJsCsW40J1_b99whgBVbGPD51xqnFsW6Bb85q6xxzHdVJnbYg6YbDCdW73q8L02cptgQW6Q8yWv9cG0ctW5PwK981Yhr02W2czNRF6VMqNfW6hfLp37K4Lvbf82Jq3T04 )

Render Recap

April 2026

Just a quarter into 2026, the developer landscape has already shifted since January. Based on our signup and usage data, it's clear that:

- The backend is back in. AI workloads need real, reliable computational muscle behind them.
- Software is shipping software. Teams are handing the deployment keys to their agents, and those agents need to know how to drive.

On a mildly related note, here's what we've been up to at Render.

Headlines_

Queue up, scale out

Render Workflows: chainable tasks for apps and agents (https://d2xMk204.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/GG+113/d2xMk204/VWm1JK6SbQv5W2rGnRV25TXRYW4vJbXQ5MZlB7N4Pt_Nd2-dFMW7Y8-PT6lZ3nnW43YSBc2jJXMqVycRyK3HQS10W2pn3xP6Tq-RxW41mY177GSPzsN8DBHLlsymZGW61V_1l3KJN-_W2y9QB357Pk4TW69p-Cg3YGCg8W76FJG4857MWmW8pMD5J1R0T8RW1_3ymV9jdP5nW93SjFs32rH44W3bCmZd41JGb5W7hDBYl8bnDmJW7zNYZJ1ZW6cVW12Y4f97XbnsYW7BhpXN20G__LVWND-w89J9NdVVxWt_1wW1ZGW5TSfZ-4LZGg6W8MrJM345rnCLW3fkqd555tt9tN4KPz9nwWXKlN2s2GVGD-px7VlFVsl74XsdkW8c1VB15dc9Xtf3hrBST04 )

Now in public beta, Render Workflows replaces scattered queues, workers, and custom retry logic with an intuitive SDK.

Define chains of tasks in your code, and rapidly spin them up on distributed compute with built-in retries and observability.

Learn more about workflows in the blog post (https://d2xMk204.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/GG+113/d2xMk204/VWm1JK6SbQv5W2rGnRV25TXRYW4vJbXQ5MZlB7N4Pt_Nd2-dFMW7Y8-PT6lZ3nnW43YSBc2jJXMqVycRyK3HQS10W2pn3xP6Tq-RxW41mY177GSPzsN8DBHLlsymZGW61V_1l3KJN-_W2y9QB357Pk4TW69p-Cg3YGCg8W76FJG4857MWmW8pMD5J1R0T8RW1_3ymV9jdP5nW93SjFs32rH44W3bCmZd41JGb5W7hDBYl8bnDmJW7zNYZJ1ZW6cVW12Y4f97XbnsYW7BhpXN20G__LVWND-w89J9NdVVxWt_1wW1ZGW5TSfZ-4LZGg6W8MrJM345rnCLW3fkqd555tt9tN4KPz9nwWXKlN2s2GVGD-px7VlFVsl74XsdkW8c1VB15dc9Xtf3hrBST04 ) , then get started in minutes with the docs (https://d2xMk204.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/GG+113/d2xMk204/VWm1JK6SbQv5W2rGnRV25TXRYW4vJbXQ5MZlB7N4Pt_Ml2-dFMW69sMD-6lZ3mnW8_XTDd1rds5-W4ZXv7D92G4lcN4NFCtSh0Lr3W473JcM5HPmfHW1wJQzq34JrD9N5jlm9Mym7vsW6Lkl5n92zg4TW91DmLX4-Lp5tW2zDS6w2P9B40W26Y5q65jcZ8QVf0JD21bPvRcW5fbXjV6GTJd9W3ZpBb19kghnwW6Y5PPg1Pr003W3QhHxN8_NwWnN8pszYhdX773W2s_hBb5NK1LdW7zsQ8w178DqpN3LmJ-gDrjYpW6PCBtz173TbNf51jb3604 ) .

Keep production clean

Request early access for Render Sandboxes (https://d2xMk204.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/GG+113/d2xMk204/VWm1JK6SbQv5W2rGnRV25TXRYW4vJbXQ5MZlB7N4Pt_Ml2-dFMW69sMD-6lZ3lsW6ZcC-m2XQ0j0N3jn9ktDfXgYW3RzXR08gFJRZW8bNWTD5SSltZW8--4213WZ0P-W7f5-tB1h5fJDW4MqrDw8jNCflW6ZRV0p5Wd36_W1QLxRT5dBghGW3b059K8zVwqrW5jrh0k87KtZVV74Vvh6WZLlTV7V6dx7X87MsW1KnxWF6NDJc2W8dYTDW375JWcW5Wn0HM1hWPVJW87vZRf39Y0nmW7QHsvP5zTRJ7VVFrkY4mxwrMW6ZchKk6_DfK0f21NzH804 )

Agents are constantly creating and transforming application code. They need isolated, ephemeral environments to test changes safely without touching production.

We're building Render Sandboxes to support this new pace of iteration. Join the waitlist for early access. (https://d2xMk204.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/GG+113/d2xMk204/VWm1JK6SbQv5W2rGnRV25TXRYW4vJbXQ5MZlB7N4Pt_Ml2-dFMW69sMD-6lZ3lsW6ZcC-m2XQ0j0N3jn9ktDfXgYW3RzXR08gFJRZW8bNWTD5SSltZW8--4213WZ0P-W7f5-tB1h5fJDW4MqrDw8jNCflW6ZRV0p5Wd36_W1QLxRT5dBghGW3b059K8zVwqrW5jrh0k87KtZVV74Vvh6WZLlTV7V6dx7X87MsW1KnxWF6NDJc2W8dYTDW375JWcW5Wn0HM1hWPVJW87vZRf39Y0nmW7QHsvP5zTRJ7VVFrkY4mxwrMW6ZchKk6_DfK0f21NzH804 )

For the long run

Render's $100M Series C-1 (https://d2xMk204.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/GG+113/d2xMk204/VWm1JK6SbQv5W2rGnRV25TXRYW4vJbXQ5MZlB7N4Pt_MF2-dFMW6N1vHY6lZ3m5W1dJl_06THXSMW3rxcQF4k7zg9W4PZdCT6GqY8DW5gyx5Z5VDy9HW2sV3Bl87L90jW3w1XFy2Kksn_N38qdfFR2fdQW2dVkDf2XLc_DW2GsSD53HVvQ7Tgs9w8fpDN2W7GB84j7qwRVwW89ykTf2xkK51W6Zb5ls44QM9NW3Ydy_41GY_zMN1VNDh7WTVgcW3kFYxf1dP9ccW66jDhP8ttYCDW2g7M9f4_BtcsVldpv74lz5BdW1sRB1q5YxC8dW6XZk7B6p_lwJW4lXVMy5x9njYf13mzCW04 )

We're investing this extension of our Series C into delivering a unified runtime for apps and agents, expanding the core platform with capabilities like object storage, and supporting the next wave of teams scaling on Render.

Expect continued improvements across long-running compute, durable execution, and day-to-day developer experience for teams building modern software.

Improvements_

Terminal velocity

Create services from the command line (https://d2xMk204.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/GG+113/d2xMk204/VWm1JK6SbQv5W2rGnRV25TXRYW4vJbXQ5MZlB7N4Pt_MY2-dFMW7lCdLW6lZ3pyW6-StR_50g7zNW23g4774vxN9JW8yFNBM8RslmBW1bmXVS7PBnVLW8Q8WPH8RHYQtW832g9Y3sCr1jW82qgn12cF5WDW4y-JLN7XqqsNW6mXNqG3NpTVMN4yMWmCRZFf1W7k2WhT6wDZh6W4QfnCT9b2rdpMnZyp2_JdZ4W7pZRsb4HZ8P5W1nK7w53zJTgMW1TNjyH1VVZFLW95Py1z4lwLCWW6y-hVj6GJY6WN42HsYPbFQ1gW84ZRK850N82qW893vn78Gyq7-W1SKBJp65_S4tM45GrPH4HGmW90dxvS97p1mjdJBSyq04 )

We've been expanding the Render CLI's surface area to give you more programmatic control. Now you can:

- Create new services
- Install Render's official skills
- Validate your Blueprint YAML
- Run one-off database queries

For more, see the full CLI changelog (https://d2xMk204.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/GG+113/d2xMk204/VWm1JK6SbQv5W2rGnRV25TXRYW4vJbXQ5MZlB7N4Pt_MY3lcq-W7lCdLW6lZ3kxW5l_VVb16RSlTW66_ccD2rw-jXW5hPLml5FDKcTVnlRhM3bGcqnW1MRwdT96_NJBN4qr4zmwjRSsW39KBxR4VRrLZVqysRD8Qy4K-W7ZH5dQ85h7HLW7TnXHb4Yt17GW7ZsQr85r39W9W3MmrQL262BF_W35N93X6klZmqW25DTfb4CgqQ0W1TgtgR8VVkWxMppchvNymY4W2-0FRB7q2rQcW7S_F8Q3StK5RW6ZKtFb70sTbHN3WSQBmhWwfbW21TZ7n2bYcMMW4-SdMl8bY-NPW3n3bTP5P6D4TW5hjrVS8ndM2vf1tZz2H04 ) and command reference (https://d2xMk204.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/GG+113/d2xMk204/VWm1JK6SbQv5W2rGnRV25TXRYW4vJbXQ5MZlB7N4Pt_Ml2-dFMW69sMD-6lZ3lDW6v8hVT8sj8dvW61ZgFx6tXJM5N2JgF41D6mwDW7mqxbC3FmjSlVy_xTQ2zwZ10W4wBddn10v7xPW8lRbPG5-z1TvW1W35Ss7SYc1XW998PNx73rMMCW3lNP3N136jnPW2FBwtr5RCP0GW3w33ZD2gZCdRW5-99bF8PW68ZW6t-GYz8d_w41VP-HKP5nzWxsW5_h7ML18yNRdW5bMcMN1d3sCwW80tSWl4ddQ_VMwbCpmz23JXW1BnP9m2f-MNKf8T59DT04 ) .

Code à la carte

Deploy a Render template (https://d2xMk204.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/GG+113/d2xMk204/VWm1JK6SbQv5W2rGnRV25TXRYW4vJbXQ5MZlB7N4Pt_Ml2-dFMW69sMD-6lZ3p1W7hQ4k_4dWvBKN5vlsLHczpjcN7xmQm9v3S4vW5j3Rn443Gs6_W2pJ1Z-22MNp9W6FL0kw7z7lZFVc9YgZ34GxGWW35-BLt2R5k-VW4Hlv208L65V8W49YyR-8nq-MPW3jFQZM3JRjyqW7L9ZKj7TrsbTN4GbWXnRH6LVW5bzlgp47N68CW2yFXHd6h2vvdW2TMx6S260K20W8gqFc74sPLPjW5nGcVN8ShC6DW2Rrtt84N0kX5W5d2LP-5KtpzCf799JMn04 )

Looking for some infra inspiration? Our new template library gets you up and running with a smorgasbord of multi-service stacks:

- Ship your own MCP server in TypeScript (https://d2xMk204.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/GG+113/d2xMk204/VWm1JK6SbQv5W2rGnRV25TXRYW4vJbXQ5MZlB7N4Pt_MF2-dFMW6N1vHY6lZ3l9W1np5wv1BSMmQW773Cg06dpyb9W7_5crd2SdLnyW37tnyg38WyvNW4GBsxb5QvMTRW2Cb0kP2VMvP7W8DMkdT5hp8hdW23S43s7DbVLvW3C0d3P7BKgVYW8tzF4S44F-jWW3w628t328D2lW8w3VCQ5J5XRFW4b2PnG92XwhwN6WCbf62Tl_yW1NVby72wjKKmN7Pf9XjKKyvKW5J0FkS513WhxW5Q6FBT5FGsN9W7wS4Xb3-3QQcW404v2g7gDDPlW1WRY3P1V_6XwW5dr92l2Rg9NDf1pnjbn04 ) or Python (https://d2xMk204.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/GG+113/d2xMk204/VWm1JK6SbQv5W2rGnRV25TXRYW4vJbXQ5MZlB7N4Pt_MF2-dFMW6N1vHY6lZ3pPW6PdW_03G0-LkW2fcRPt1qdSKZW6Rh4jZ4w0g5jW6Scp7S2yZDBQW7W42-z3VGj4HW8sRV4n5rlK8xW6xJC6s8N0pN5W81dwsw6RnFnJW79HSBf7Qkk9YW6g0xmQ67PxbrW85zb1x4cwh9ZN3Llg3Y344g5W73bwKp7LqxJKW1KbP936BdcRjW3g6q4X8S14mMW9lxSBn74x4pnW4X_PG61RLTxvW749RJX98C3ZdW29J0NS5gCK4rVNsWtG2LL_7TW4pq7VK8n2W1nW1nPw0K8XQMrPf4dz_sR04 )

subject: Welcome to Claude — let’s get started
body:
Imagine having a thought partner who helps turn your ideas into reality. That's 
Claude. 




 <https://claude.ai/chat?utm_content=logo>
full_body:
Imagine having a thought partner who helps turn your ideas into reality. That's 
Claude. 




 <https://claude.ai/chat?utm_content=logo> 



Meet Claude, the AI for problem solvers 




 <https://claude.ai/chat?utm_content=hero-image-link> 


From answering deep questions to automating tasks, Claude helps you think 
bigger and work smarter. 

Get started  <https://claude.ai/chat?utm_content=hero-cta> 



Ready to put Claude to work? 






Ask Claude anything 
Claude can help you make dinner plans, plan a vacation, understand contracts, 
and more. Think of something you're working on and ask Claude to help. 





Create what you need, instantly 
Generate slideshows, spreadsheets, and reports with simple conversational 
commands. Claude builds the actual files you need to get things done. 





Connect your everyday tools 
Integrate email accounts, calendars, or work tools with Claude and it will 
help you find what you need, organize your notes, execute admin tasks, and more.



Switch to Claude without starting over 
We've made it easier to import saved memories into Claude. Get started in 
Settings > Memory 
<https://claude.ai/settings/capabilities?open_memory_import=true?utm_content=inline-link>
.

subject: The secret to your first "aha moment" with Claude (1/5)
body:
The moment happens faster when you give Claude context. Here's how. 




 <https://claude.ai/chat?utm_content=logo> 



Your first “aha momen
full_body:
The moment happens faster when you give Claude context. Here's how. 




 <https://claude.ai/chat?utm_content=logo> 



Your first “aha moment” with Claude 




 <https://claude.ai/chat?utm_content=hero-image-link> 



The best part about Claude? When it suddenly clicks and you wonder how you 
ever worked without it. The moment happens faster when you give Claude context.

Instead of: “Write me a recipe” 

Try: "I'm a beginner cook with limited kitchen equipment. Can you suggest an 
easy pasta dish that uses 5 ingredients or less? I'm cooking for two people and 
prefer vegetarian options." 

Chat with Claude  <https://claude.ai/chat?utm_content=hero-cta> 



How to give Claude context 






Who 
Tell Claude about yourself if it's relevant (“I'm a marketing manager working 
on a campaign”) 





What 
Be specific about your task ("I need to write a blog post about sustainable 
fashion") 





Why 
Share your goals ("This needs to appeal to Gen Z customers") 





How 
Mention any preferences ("Keep it under 500 words and include statistics") 




Chat with Claude  <https://claude.ai/chat?utm_content=secondary-cta> 



Team up with Claude anywhere 

Claude is always available, everywhere—on your laptop, phone, or tablet. 
Having Claude just a tap away means more breakthrough moments—turning ambitious 
ideas into achievable goals with instant support. 



Download the app 
Conversations follow you. Start a thought here, finish anywhere. Claude 
remembers where you left off.

Hey jani,

What if building with AI felt more like engineering than prompting?

HackerRank Orchestrate is for developers who want to go beyond demos and build real AI systems, agents, workflows, and practical applications.

What you’ll do:

• Get a real-world challenge (May 1, 05:30 AM UTC)  
• Build your agent using tools like Cursor, Claude Code, or Codex  
• Walk through your approach with an AI judge

Winners get:

• $1000+ in AI tools + opportunities with top tech companies  
• 1:1 chats with industry experts  
• HackerRank merch  
• AI mock interview credits for all participants

Timeline:

May 1–2 (starts 05:30 AM UTC)  
Register by Apr 30, 02:30 PM UTC

full_body:
Imagine what you could do with a few more hours in your day. 




 <https://claude.ai/chat?utm_content=logo> 



5 ways Claude can work with you 




 <https://claude.ai/chat?utm_content=hero-image> 



Life can be busy! Imagine what you could do with a few more hours in your day? 
Claude can give you those hours back. 

Chat with Claude  <https://claude.ai/chat?utm_content=hero-cta> 



Prompts to get you more time back in your day 
The easiest way to get started is to simply ask Claude a question or give 
Claude a task. Here are a few simple ideas: 





Email management 
Try: “Help me write a diplomatic email declining a project opportunity.”

Claude can help draft emails for different situations, from follow-ups to 
sensitive communications. 
Send this to Claude 
<https://claude.ai/new?&utm_content=inline-link&q=Help%20me%20write%20a%20diplomatic%20email%20declining%20a%20project%20opportunity>





Research assistant 
Try: “Summarize the latest trends in remote work technology.”

Need to gather information quickly? Claude can synthesize information on 
industry trends, competitors, or technical concepts. 
Ask Claude for research help 
<https://claude.ai/new?&utm_content=inline-link&q=Summarize%20the%20latest%20trends%20in%20remote%20work%20technology>





Content creation 
Try: “Help me outline a presentation on our quarterly results.”

Whether it's blog posts, social media content, or presentations, Claude can 
help generate ideas or draft content. 
Create content with Claude 
<https://claude.ai/new?&utm_content=inline-link&q=Help%20me%20outline%20a%20presentation%20on%20our%20quarterly%20results>





Problem-solving 
Try: “Help me see the different angles of this problem and potential 
solutions.”

Stuck on a challenging problem? Explain it to Claude to help you think through 
different approaches. Claude might ask questions that lead to breakthrough 
insights. 
Problem solve with Claude 
<https://claude.ai/new?&utm_content=inline-link&q=Help%20me%20see%20the%20different%20angles%20of%20this%20problem%20and%20potential%20solutions>





Meeting prep 
Try: “Help me prep for my 10am marketing meeting by summarizing relevant 
emails and docs.”

Claude Pro and Max users can integrate their Google Workspace to search 
emails, review documents, and see calendar commitments. 
Explore Pro and Max plan <https://claude.ai/upgrade?utm_content=inline-link> 



Chat with Claude  <https://claude.ai/chat?utm_content=secondary-cta> 




 <https://claude.ai/chat?utm_content=logo-footer> 

 <https://apps.apple.com/us/app/claude-by-anthropic/id6473753684>  
<https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.anthropic.claude> 



 <https://www.instagram.com/claudeai/> 

 <https://www.linkedin.com/showcase/claude/> 

 <https://x.com/claudeai> 

 <https://www.youtube.com/@anthropic-ai>

subject:
Introduction to Quantum Computing: Quantum Algorithms and Qiskit :
 Result Published!!
body: ***THIS IS APPLICABLE ONLY FOR EXAM REGISTERED CANDIDATES***
full_body:
***THIS IS APPLICABLE ONLY FOR EXAM REGISTERED CANDIDATES***
****Please don't click on below link, if you are not registered/not present for the Exam****

Dear Candidate,

The exam scores and E-Certificates have been released for March 2026 Exam(s).

Step 1 - Are the results of my courses released?
Please check the Results published courses list in the below links.:-
March 2026 Exam - Click here

Step 2 - How to check Results?
Please login to internalapp.nptel.ac.in/. and check your exam results.
Use the same login credentials as used to register for the exam.

What's next?
Please read the pass criteria carefully and check against what you have gotten.
If you still have any issues, please report the same here. internalapp.nptel.ac.in/. We will reply within a week.

Last date to report queries: 3 days within publishing of scores.

Note :
Hard copies of certificates will not be dispatched.
The duration shown in the certificate will be based on the timeline of offering of the course in 2026, irrespective of which Assignment score that will be considered.

You can now provide your feedback by creating a post and sharing it with your friends on social media platforms.
Here's how:

  1. Log in to your account and navigate to the "Download E-certificate" section.
  2. Next to "Download E-certificate," you'll find another tab labeled "Announce your results." Click on it.
  3. Answer the provided questions about your experience.
  4. Optionally, you can add your picture or skip this step.
  5. An AI-assisted post will be generated for you. You can share this post on your social media platforms.

Please note that this option is available only if you have passed the course and are eligible for a certificate.

Thanks and Best wishes.
NPTEL Team

--
You received this message because you are subscribed to the Google Groups "Announcement list for Intro. to Quantum Computing: Algorithms & Qiskit" group.
To unsubscribe from this group and stop receiving emails from it, send an email to noc26-cs89-announce+unsubscribe@nptel.iitm.ac.in.
To view this discussion visit https://groups.google.com/a/nptel.iitm.ac.in/d/msgid/noc26-cs89-announce/g4V2ejJkQBWW4AsKBfmzzw%40geopod-ismtpd-1.
For more options, visit https://groups.google.com/a/nptel.iitm.ac.in/d/optout.

full_body:
Tackle projects like personal learning, decision-making, and household planning.




 <https://claude.ai/chat?utm_content=logo> 



Using Claude for your everyday life 




 <https://claude.ai/chat?utm_content=hero-image-link> 



While Claude excels at work tasks, it can be just as valuable for your 
personal life, tackling everyday challenges and projects like personal 
learning, decision-making, and household planning. 

Chat with Claude  <https://claude.ai/chat?utm_content=hero-cta> 



How Claude fits into your personal life 





Life assistant 
Let Claude tackle recurring household planning tasks that eat up your time. 

Try: “I’m tired of meal-prepping the same 5 meals. Can you suggest some 
unconventional ideas that are easy to prepare but packed with protein?” 





Personal learning coach 
Claude can help you acquire new skills or knowledge more efficiently. 

Try: “I want to learn basic Spanish for my upcoming trip. Create a two-week 
study plan with daily 15-minute lessons.” 





Decision-making support 
Facing complex personal choices? Claude can organize information and help you 
think through options.

Try: “Help me compare Portugal and Switzerland for an upcoming vacation based 
on culture, cost, and travel logistics.” 





Creative project partner 
Whether planning celebrations or pursuing hobbies, Claude can spark ideas and 
help with execution.

Try: “I need creative ideas for my parents' 40th anniversary celebration that 
won't break the bank.” 





Simplify complex topics 
Need help understanding complex topics? Claude can break down technical, 
academic, or professional concepts into simple terms.

Try: “Break down my car insurance policy so I understand what each section 
means.” 



Team up with Claude anywhere 
With the Claude mobile app, personalized help is always at hand—whether you're 
at the grocery store, planning your day, or tackling home projects. 

Chat with Claude  <https://claude.ai/chat?utm_content=secondary-cta> 



Download the app 
Conversations follow you. Start a thought here, finish anywhere. Claude 
remembers where you left off.

Workflows GA,﻿ Flags GA,﻿ faster builds,﻿ and more
                                                    ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­  

Vercel monthly product update

We open sourced Open Agents, a reference app for background coding agents, and three major primitives moved from beta to generally available.
 

We open sourced open-agents.dev

Open Agents is an open-source reference app for building and running background coding agents on Vercel. It includes the web UI, the agent runtime, sandbox orchestration, and the GitHub integration needed to go from prompt to code changes without keeping your laptop involved.

 

Read more →
 

Vercel Workflows is generally available

Vercel Workflows is now GA for TypeScript, and the Python SDK is in beta. Write durable, long-running agents and backends that survive restarts, deployments, and failures.

 

Before Workflows, running anything longer than a single request meant wiring up your own queues, retry logic, and monitoring. Now durability is an extension of your application code: use simple directives to build agents that maintain state across tool-calling chains, multi-step onboarding flows, and payment processing.

 

Read the blog post →
 

Vercel Flags is generally available

Feature Flags are GA on Vercel. Create flags with targeting rules, user segments, and environment controls in the dashboard.

 

The Flags SDK integrates natively with Next.js and SvelteKit, and with other frameworks through OpenFeature. Agents can also install and manage flags from the command line with vercel flags.

 

Read the changelog →
 

Elastic Builds GA and lower build pricing

Elastic build machines are GA and are now the default for new Pro teams. Elastic builds evaluate each project and assign the right machine to balance speed and cost.

 

Read the changelog →
 

Also shipped
  • Zero Data Retention and prompt training controls on AI Gateway
  • Observability Plus base fee removed
  • Workflow run log filtering
  • Sandbox now supports up to 32 vCPU and 64 GB RAM

View more recent changes →
 

What's next

Ship 2026 is coming to five cities this summer. Request your ticket today.
 

Talk to a Vercel expert →
Docs | Blog | Contact | Community | Careers
440 N Barranca Ave #4133 Covina, CA 91723
