subject: You’re now using Gemini on web
body:
Get the most out of Gemini on web

Welcome to Gemini, an AI assistant from Google that can help you  
supercharge your creativity and productivity.
full_body:
Get the most out of Gemini on web

Welcome to Gemini, an AI assistant from Google that can help you  
supercharge your creativity and productivity. With the Gemini web app, you  
can get help writing, creating, learning, and more at  
gemini.google.com<<https://c.gle/AOExmq2lPG9jj8FVkRAS_I-nUN9fXIQddf7T0bTuVIXkTwCbHdYCXMgZZvVsq33esAKR0oR8SPmF6Pp4QJFyDmqPLC04dcuOv8w7EY7bvjKsuweKzUqrGmFgZ3Zlc9eSiPmrdA-lGf8xgZ__>>.  
Learn  
more<<https://c.gle/AOExmq15LRiBQcOmbk-tfbL5xDtuZtzBQMPfSUnlvYPi8KvxUACYEtwF6ZtWG2zfXftR_1_ce0T1uKgnv1FgcdqlRwXdl5NwXZLna3OmhttaIgg3ELAksV6Q3XNkI5wRWuQKFhXTlVIO6hiZRIGQjbtJ8rv1HLCIRyaO4BtCekzkREyx>>  
about what you can do with Gemini on the web.

How Gemini handles data and works with other services

Gemini activity and your choices

Your chats, what you share with Gemini (like files, videos, screens, and  
photos), audio, transcripts, and recordings of your Gemini Live  
interactions, your feedback, info from websites you visit with Gemini,  
product usage, and location  
info<<https://c.gle/AOExmq0fuhcWlKF5d6hbM41UkYjZxFnwgKMbBWDj0kN7cnE4djRVmidzTVoEd0r2BcIHo_agKbfd30k94-Lnw-bWzz1RM-gzy_fetSc6c020sol2JGtMNeqgC2N_tAuYs4munR5icgEwAZjZdlXqPlNw>>  
are saved in Gemini Apps  
Activity<<https://c.gle/AOExmq17VfAInxFYOt5vEtbfNmiNJsRx5fncdAHtusRmiZHfVF8FaWRcnYFqH06N6v1wRh09xqNC5K8YDyM-geyp2rc3U_AT3aNIovscyKWW_0Hbfo0iT6W-3fU2rBCr-TbuuSKF1qHuTYgkD04AiTVOqN3mGlVD3OOFT96I-0ua_Q>>  
(if your Keep Activity setting is on). This data is reviewed by trained  
service providers and used to improve Google services (including Gemini  
models<<https://c.gle/AOExmq2JBszlsTrrwJ-qWoandmh0QuKGhkFQZtGihcCcRXjngboJev1_tlC3OWG2dQ1dxhCan_EzwpEb-QLRlcfIHiRsg3-oa8qL0s85PCQD2FupRxNaRAmVCrJImMOEqlPpffP9DFljoe9qGxJa17inNJnmyZagAWiJ>>  
and other generative AI models). It’s also used to personalize your  
experience<<https://c.gle/AOExmq20CORUPZdhW1gnKDw1Rp5UT-ld0eGArlK1KCJmaeGOYKVDmUxIQdarZqzL6J0c_CFpKUv0T3sx1PfxVgdXOlxsezEeCn4fxWaiMOrvHyAJCPFYxOonP-wmdLrj8ZVGkTL9Zl1EfEOxm4ymCoSg0athT6NnHz55aL-5rP2qcFPrpISXu8ybDc_dbe3y3OyrtWlpaRHUbGWsqA>>,  
depending on your settings and region. When Google uses your activity to  
improve its services, it gets help from human reviewers. To protect your  
privacy, chats are disconnected from your account before being sent to  
service providers for review. You can turn off Keep  
Activity<<https://c.gle/AOExmq3rW4PK6jma-bWrZQpQiGrzihJa1VJB6FpX5TTs9dsldarfwB_o5WHkGwnsdjEGM8krqKPK2jeE0P1ynSAYczdRSL3J4TP-kCaUB0Y52yM2IXETnj24ZV1Krmkmg3OxFvLEttKn8jZFrjKdi3bb2lxW0sXpP4SbWFK812PRlNBvP97-GQjxl4r1>>  
anytime. Be sure not to include info you wouldn’t want reviewed or used.

Gemini works with other services

Gemini can respond with real-time info from other tools, apps, and services  
like Google Maps and YouTube. You can also choose to connect services like  
Google Workspace and YouTube Music. If Gemini finds a connected app that  
can help, it will send information from your conversation and other  
relevant information to that connected app to help it generate a better  
response. You can manage your apps in your settings. Learn  
more<<https://c.gle/AOExmq0361-3DTr06EgzggxAntuAckXR9B-IWLiDcQ_4PE9gmQq7QTqQMhxC0XSJAIS1qYikcnES5rKIXPx1nTOu7Wm5HPCbTDazZUn1kgE2OcfAucgwuC_QMV-zTeTJdaLOoSD8tgreLAciYEb63d3Av_dM5shBBIC769M-xno29gSfAgM-ZOInOMMpTw>>.

Things to know

• You can  
request<<https://c.gle/AOExmq3nkIDQNXK7P84GkMaQFrRrgSwZ5SvB2Kz6hl3SwENWvQFHygZRp1ybFBgjlgJ587oGSXrwNazDzHsXbLJnKzvErAvAaY8YfglCQI_XDXEMoLJ5vj6ejepebvkhEYfiEZsbkk6Fm8vPdjMXCtfPfyb7BEl113cqFDgMAArxapfNaipDe3DJrj8Dw99mdHnT83ZkyvRzrTazQnA>>  
the removal of content under our policies or applicable laws. You can also  
export<<https://c.gle/AOExmq0GBibuchdQ0o6tGp9XWifGofLGyFtKmNaidT2FYw4oVPyzKY21fTUF0reCwa3jZ8Wkovm3rh2kYVdwvoOj1HBJcLAHVCDvKJVuSDNSxIn5-GM_n_kWmJIoFgldWPJSV02S7zMXIrSFurcEmEeTl0I>>  
your information.

• Gemini Apps are continuously evolving and may produce inaccurate  
information<<https://c.gle/AOExmq01yFjYcaJA73_-Kq1L4TrSi9GkgbFNjWU1oLbcYcRaqi_gE19EnhmUl4dXZeyYM9UcNH1eQF-JkPO6jBl2k7L--y9VPM0YS_qMTfrpqWxL4YzRAmnN4zRcKHKdc6hCg_XdOxIVQ71eDpiYBbqIj43AMIdCMn713SvULv2cXCvn-pQuTpZYSIaf>>  
(including about people) that doesn’t represent Google’s views.

• Don’t rely on responses from Gemini Apps for diagnosis, treatment, or  
medical, legal, financial, or other professional advice. Its output is for  
informational purposes only.

• Monitor Gemini’s browsing closely and interrupt if needed.


• Your  
feedback<<https://c.gle/AOExmq2Oy2prhYgua7pkYTWGSGDEDjGDmKyEkWv7kexEplzUfYrhMkYNhZQ6TTve4PebZzDE-LBq_dcZs8XNYl_4QQSSa9xgHaHddZakCLcpcK76zHdllmBkxq7cX3XZqdtS5DL8L-Sdx3p19j-qvY6fqqAN6No_RBgxkWxLc5lWEIKZTGehXEctoU69YNeZ>>  
will help make Gemini better.
Note: Google Terms of  
Service<<https://c.gle/AOExmq2jLR97oEGPuPw3AbjHMtkx4TSt_Li1SI-BeFt9ByVtiUc8UQBfXmZptzFZPzNJfVVHueFkuuCFZDEOJuJw9QlMbuHkqyVi-WJ9XLVRlUpBtnz8ySor-jh6Y8Lp8zW9PEku1RjqN2dv34yhjMwzh1dMl9lJB5Y>>  
and the Generative AI Prohibited Use  
Policy<<https://c.gle/AOExmq1hYmfhG_FErZdKAxRvYd6ojE8hmWtLObRrMGP9XRG2yDhdW2x0divQ_Jln3wcgmc8OAx5bFpCrkvvPMSEeL-6RdaW8pWel7wQ9g_IeXlKhxmwxHHxNAj9FmGGkNNYzL2O4K7MvOo5x4HTNajE0ytAXwaovFtJveL0AIPOuS2QkmFqKv25OkYZYWJYx0IDalfRpzt6ygumoVJwT>>  
apply to Gemini  
Apps<<https://c.gle/AOExmq1T5vMl4pMvVjhlC20aM2UD66HyiHByEKhH_Tos8nvTcVh0UYd_iljgONGpZLlbWUp1XGtwHiyYgJkrC5QXKcuuDORynHKmr8k-y2jxzOC29irSsN45RI-dY7fJquFrVFRWBVb0Gedrr14ws4Mk4__bbcunVhaUfx1cTqpxbQmgZBA>>.  
Google will process your data as described in the Google Privacy  
Policy<<https://c.gle/AOExmq2mHvF4L0WIh_e9KzFzn2m0824P8KOKRL72a5rnrIxGLSJnsfn-NbWO3-FINlky8axXUgRLlPaVFix7BZ1S_-gUfo3Tribydjb9IsDvCey7edzRMkOuwD4xU-CDos2gwgydeOYETVtQZNgHzC0bbY0tM_xFRz0>>  
and the Gemini Apps Privacy  
Notice<<https://c.gle/AOExmq2P6iHYdzSFzBnKhJxsgCkHf2Dt1MOwvDsJZ58Du8D3dgfH1MQ6tqSKpihngvORfPl5kAL4oTNTCAOsRP7ziqrMNGMYyti5BDY9LqWU5GNPcANoLMRx-p2Hf7jQANTOe4dwHSxLKFjTfcufT_8wL4oSgMOFrLJv2m2Cx-I9cfCM7Wy5_mvAG7XJh-vQyoNyZKBU86rQLdS-GfCMp9gE>>.  
Gemini can make mistakes, including about people, so double-check  
it<<https://c.gle/AOExmq3KyKvdQrz75OjiZnPhj_0IJYkLqcg0iMArLdrKqBXpHy_2UxV8acAB2MXj06dIz7GbT5hii8lhbCXApGJJ-k0xsjzknNvbvicMiG23wFrZA10bJIkBI12Zb_SVUeLw9fRggy4vGzesjK6wxtaR1jKcmBYzruK32nK9jCjBwJT_UBoM4Q>>.  
Respect others’  
rights<<https://c.gle/AOExmq0-uvsFhdKzyC3AoYr4qqezV3JMbvlGVHSFhGPNxweH7A3WeqjfmJSgBaF7Bw8WN9I0j7nHp6SZ_Msc7oqfUdTjYhoVU2KxkdlgN1aFS9UA7bBcdoZkBejVAIXmY5ekMc_634qlbYhy2L8k0JthuKl7dKHDK8CMkgaTR9gmvzskbQngUj6KWnYqFoFvIspz4SwutQ>>  
and ask before including them in a Gemini Live chat.

© 2026 Google LLC 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043

You have received this mandatory service announcement to update you about

subject: Thank you for learning with NPTEL!!
body:
Dear Learner,

Thank you for taking the course with NPTEL!!
Hope you enjoyed the journey with us.
full_body:
Dear Learner,

Thank you for taking the course with NPTEL!!
Hope you enjoyed the journey with us.
The results for this course have been published, and we are closing this course now. 
You will still have access to the contents and assignments of this course, if you click on the course name from the "Mycourses" tab on swayam.gov.in.

For any further queries please write to support@nptel.iitm.ac.in.


- Team NPTEL

--
You received this message because you are subscribed to the Google Groups "Announcement list for Intro. to Quantum Computing: Algorithms & Qiskit" group.
To unsubscribe from this group and stop receiving emails from it, send an email to noc26-cs89-announce+unsubscribe@nptel.iitm.ac.in.
To view this discussion visit https://groups.google.com/a/nptel.iitm.ac.in/d/msgid/noc26-cs89-announce/xYWW_jHZTeafGLFqZR4dDQ%40geopod-ismtpd-4.
For more options, visit https://groups.google.com/a/nptel.iitm.ac.in/d/optout.

Without all the tabs

Shop smarter with ChatGPT

Instead of scrolling through pages of results, simply describe what you want.

Start shopping

ChatGPT helps you browse, compare, and refine options - all in one place - so you can find the right product faster.

Try ChatGPT to:

  • Find products that fit your budget and style
  • Upload photos to find similar products
  • Compare products side-by-side
  • Research reviews, specs, and deals without jumping between tabs

Start your next shopping search in ChatGPT.

subject: Persistent sandboxes and Docker support, now in Vercel Sandbox
body:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" xmlns:o="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:office:office" xmlns:v="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:vml">
full_body:
Plus flat rate CDN and Ship 2026
                                                    ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏  ‍͏  ͏ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­ ͏‌ ­ ­ ­ ­  

Vercel Monthly Product Update
 

Vercel Sandbox persistence is now generally available. Sandbox also supports installing and running Docker containers, and Flat Rate CDN opens in limited beta to make costs more predictable.
 

Vercel Sandbox persistence is now GA

Sandboxes now save and restore filesystem state between sessions, so long-running, durable sandboxes resume where you left off. This means teams no longer need to re-run setup steps or rebuild from scratch each time.

 

Each sandbox has a durable, customizable name that you can use to create, retrieve, or resume from. Sessions spin up and down automatically, and storage bills separately from compute, so ephemeral work can opt out with persistent: false.

Read the changelog →
 

Run Docker containers inside Vercel Sandbox

Vercel Sandbox now supports installing and running Docker inside a sandbox. You and your agent can build containers, install system packages, and modify files without touching your host system.

 

You can now run containerized services like Redis or Postgres as test dependencies, validating container images before deploying, and previewing applications served from a container. Sandbox also supports FUSE filesystem drivers and VPN clients. Combined with persistent sandboxes, the Docker installation and pulled images carry over between sessions.

Read the changelog →
 

Flat Rate CDN is in Limited Beta

Flat Rate CDN is now available in Limited Beta for Pro teams. It replaces usage-based CDN pricing with a fixed monthly fee, so your cost is predictable before the month starts.

 

You pay a fixed amount for Vercel CDN each month regardless of traffic. Edge Requests, Fast Data Transfer, and other CDN products are no longer metered, and your bill will never increase because of temporary usage spikes.

Join the waitlist →
 

Other reading
  • Protecting against token theft
  • Function invocations move to per-unit pricing
  • AI Gateway production index
  • How General Intelligence used agents to build an agent platform on Vercel
  • Optimizing Vercel Sandbox snapshots

View more recent changes →
 

What's coming up

Ship 2026 is the one-day event featuring keynotes, customer sessions, and hands-on workshops to ship what's next in apps and agents.

  • London 6.17
  • Berlin 6.25
  • New York 6.30
  • Sydney 7.30
  • San Francisco 10.15

Hear from Anthropic, Google DeepMind, Notion, OpenAI, Slack, and more. Get your ticket today.

subject: FatakPay Ticket Received - CSFFPL0606202601547230
body:
Dearjani sannigandla,

Thank you for reaching out to the FatakPay Customer Support team.

We are currently experiencing a high volume of requests,
full_body:
Dearjani sannigandla,

Thank you for reaching out to the FatakPay Customer Support team.

We are currently experiencing a high volume of requests, and our response may
take slightly longer than usual. We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience
and truly appreciate your patience.

(वर्तमानमेंहमेंबहुतअधिकअनुरोधप्राप्तहोरहेहैं,इसलिएहमारेउत्तरमेंसामान्यसेथोड़ा
अधिकसमयलगसकताहै।हुईअसुविधाकेलिएहमेंखेदहैऔरआपकेधैर्यकेलिएहमआपकाधन्यवादकरतेहैं।)

In the meantime, please refer to the table below to see if your query may
already be addressed:

(इसबीच,कृपयानीचेदीगईतालिकादेखेंताकियहजांचसकेंकिआपकीसमस्याकासमाधानपहलेसेउपलब्धहै
यानहीं:)



Reason for Contact

Resolution / Next Steps

संपर्क करने का कारण



समाधान/ अगला कदम

Loan approved but amount not received

Once approved, the amount is typically credited within 48 hours. Please wait; it
should reflect in your account shortly.

लोन स्वीकृत हो गया है लेकिन राशि प्राप्त नहीं हुई



स्वीकृति के बाद राशि सामान्यतः 48 घंटों के भीतर आपके खाते में जमा हो जाती है। 
कृपया प्रतीक्षा करें, यह जल्द ही आपके खाते में दिखाई देगी।

Extra amount deducted from your bank account

This is a rare occurrence. Any extra repayment will be automatically reversed
within 3–5 business days. No action is required from your end.

आपके बैंक खाते से अतिरिक्त राशि कट गई है



यह बहुत ही दुर्लभ स्थिति है। यदि अतिरिक्त राशि कट गई है, तो वह 3–5 कार्यदिवसों 
के भीतर स्वतः वापस कर दी जाएगी। आपको अपनी ओर से कोई कार्रवाई करने की आवश्यकता 
नहीं है।

Application not working properly

This is likely a temporary technical issue. Please uninstall and reinstallthe
Fatakpay app, then try again.

एप्लिकेशन सही से काम नहीं कर रहा



यह संभवतः अस्थायी तकनीकी समस्या है। कृपयाFatakpay ऐप को अनइंस्टॉल करके दोबारा 
इंस्टॉल करें और फिर प्रयास करें।

Collections / Recovery related concerns

Please contact our dedicated Collections team directly at- 8828855360.

कलेक्शन/ रिकवरी से संबंधित समस्या



कृपया हमारी समर्पित कलेक्शन टीम से सीधे इस नंबर पर संपर्क करें- 8828855360

Request for NOC (No Objection Certificate)

To request your NOC, please ensure your loan is fully repaidwith no outstanding
dues.

You may raise a formal NOC request by Opening the Fatakpay App >> Navigate to
the Menu and select Settings >> Go to the Legal section and select Fatakpay
Documents >> Click on NOC >> Identify your closed loan and raise the request.

Once the request is submitted, NOC will be issued to you within5 working days

NOC (नो ऑब्जेक्शन सर्टिफिकेट) का अनुरोध



NOC के लिए अनुरोध करने से पहले कृपया सुनिश्चित करें कि आपका लोन पूरी तरह चुकता 
हो चुका है और कोई बकाया नहीं है।

आपFatakpay ऐप खोलकर औपचारिकNOC अनुरोध दर्ज कर सकते हैं:

Fatakpay App खोलें→ Menu में जाएं और Settings चुनें→ Legal सेक्शन में जाएं और 
FatakpayDocuments चुनें→ NOC पर क्लिक करें→ अपने बंद(Closed) लोन की पहचान करें 
और अनुरोध दर्ज करें।

अनुरोध सबमिट करने के बाद, NOC आपको 5 कार्यदिवसों के भीतर जारी कर दिया जाएगा।



If your concern is not listed above, rest assured our team will get back to you
as soon as possible.

Thank you for being a valued Fatakpay customer.

Warm regards,

Fatakpay Customer Support Team

* * *

Hey jani,

We ran our first agent-building hackathon last month. 13,000 registrants. 48 countries. 1,300+ agents submitted. See what participants built and how they were evaluated [Read the recap](http://email.postmaster.hackerrankmail.com/c/eJw8zTuOrDAQQNHV2GGrPrYxgYMnPXkbrcIUDcOnEfagWf6ok8mubnLG1IcgZDVhFxE6gOjtnKKbUBkHZh2EHU84sSsSUWnEKNEuiYACBATwDsk_MBA4N-mgMpQixTg437XtUptej1nKqtclx7rLsj3Ke7dbmls7q-F_hrKh_PO5hvJ1L7euhnJt0r6roUzgY-chcO99wI57jIZzNfyfwF7pS46lynEsLznGTYiCcfD6c1r65LPpfm7S9Ildj_ZO9BsAAP__P8JLHA).

Introducing HackerRank Orchestrate, June Edition.

The premise is simple: you get a real-world problem, 24 hours, and the tools of your choice. Build an agent that actually works. Then walk an AI judge through what you built and why.

What's at stake :

• ~$1,200 in Claude Max 5× for 1 year  
• Introductions to top tech companies  
• 1:1 sessions with industry experts  
• Exclusive HackerRank merch  
• AI mock interview credits for all participants

Timeline :

• Challenge goes live: June 19, 11:00 AM IST  
• Register by: June 18, 8:00 PM IST

[Register here](http://email.postmaster.hackerrankmail.com/c/eJxMj8GqszAQRp9m3LVMJhrrIosfxNeQMU6rrYmSxN_Xvwhyb3cfh8OBb7SNMUyFWFU_FNaIj6qY7KjoWQ1K2JAaGJuaeKThoZEa1gOZYraEZNAoxKpUVN2VISzLpwzCg3PsoMRtTdlzyhLvE7uPxMjh43le7m71xWKnnLcE-h9QB9Qdx_GlnQpQ9wdua3STpBw5y-29ByEDutuz79O6Ryeg2zOdgMwJvYzz7kG3ctILOvYbz68Auv2q9VftctaQJWTQbZCj35PEVET75jAnDmF-cRgXJjJQ4uv3S7bn7LP4bTmLqm5U8d_STwAAAP__mKF0ww)

[Join our Discord](http://email.postmaster.hackerrankmail.com/c/eJw8zLtu7CAQANCvgdIaZnm5oNjG9S1u6tUwYJusjS1AKfL1UZp0pzopzNYSyhyU8wocgDdyDym51ZFbI5E3_JizJvZKzy5SMh5ZloCAFqwCMFqhmZRF0HrNMVNkJhYa7quPk_rIbdqJ37k1qu-TyjHxdcoj7GPcXTyeAheBSyqdr5ambRO4_P_uH_Tc_8UmW_ikWjrVWjaq6SBEKzRsf9EIv3yNfN4HjfxSblbyK-BPAAAA___3xkUa).

See you there!

Best,  
Team HackerRank
